data.title: Uwill Ranks 8th Fastest-Growing Private Company in the Northeast
data.description: For the second consecutive year, Uwill, a prominent mental health organization, has been ranked in the top ten for sustained growth and innovation across a nine-state region that includes New York, New Jersey, and Massachusetts. The company, based in NATICK, Mass., has been recognized by Inc. Magazine for its outstanding performance.

data.title: CellCarta and Pillar Biosciences Announce Multi-Year Global Strategic Partnership to Expand Rapid, Decentralized Tumor Profiling for Oncology Clinical Trials
data.description: In a new partnership, Pillar is combining its range of oncoReveal® kitted NGS panels with CellCarta's extensive laboratory network and biomarker knowledge to enhance efficiency in screening. The collaboration aims to decrease screening challenges, enhance turnaround time, lower failure rates, and facilitate the expansion of companion diagnostic initiatives. This initiative is set to positively impact the improvement of oncological diagnostics and treatment.

data.title: HawkEye 360 Expands Board of Directors with Two New Appointments
data.description: On April 2, 2026, in Herndon, Virginia, HawkEye 360, a prominent provider of signals intelligence data and analytics, revealed the addition of Jonathan Shames and Frank Finelli to its Board of Directors. These new appointments signal a strategic move by the company to broaden its expertise in finance and defense industries. The global leader aims to leverage the extensive experience of Shames and Finelli to drive further growth and innovation in the sector.

data.title: Ellipsys Vascular Access System to Return to U.S. Market in 2026
data.description: A reliable percutaneous arteriovenous (AV) fistula technology is slated for a comeback in 2026 with a gradual release. Ellipsys Medical, Inc. disclosed today that the Ellipsys® Vascular Access System will be reintroduced to the market, commencing in April. The reentry is expected to bring cutting-edge technology back to the medical sector, offering improved vascular access solutions. This decision follows a hiatus in availability, and the phased rollout indicates a strategic approach to market reentry. Located in SAN CLEMENTE, Calif., the company's announcement signals a new chapter in reviving access to advanced medical technology. This development is noteworthy for individuals in need of AV fistula solutions and showcases the company's commitment to innovation. Stay tuned for further updates on the reemergence of this impactful medical technology.

data.title: Everus Acquires SE&M, Leading Contractor in Southeast Region
data.description: BISMARCK, North Dakota – Everus Construction Group (NYSE: ECG) has revealed its acquisition of SE&M Constructors, Inc., SE&M of the Triangle, Inc., and SECO Rentals, LLC as a single entity - SE&M. With a founding year of 1923 and based in Elm City, North Carolina, SE&M specializes in offering mechanical, electrical, and plumbing services to clients in sectors like pharmaceuticals, complex industrial projects, and healthcare. The company generates around 65% of its revenue from these services.

data.title: IFF Launches PureStrong™, a Probiotic Made Specifically for Dogs
data.description: In New York, IFF (NYSE: IFF), a renowned company in flavors, fragrances, food ingredients, and health & biosciences, is launching PureStrong™, a specialized probiotic designed for improving canine digestive health. As more individuals view their dogs as family members, there is a notable increase in the $3.2 billion U.S. pet supplement industry. Approximately half of U.S. pet owners have bought or are contemplating purchasing probiotics for their dogs. PureStrong™ aims to establish a new benchmark in this growing market.

data.title: SunnyD Vodka Seltzer Brings PURPLE to Life -- A Flavor 30 Years in the Making
data.description: After being inspired by the famous 1990s SunnyD advertisement, the highly anticipated "Purple" beverage has been transformed into a convenient ready-to-drink vodka seltzer. This creation comes after over 30 years of speculation surrounding the mysterious purple drink featured in the commercial. The product named SunnyD Vodka Seltzer is set to hit the market in Stamford, Connecticut on April 2, 2026. This innovative drink is expected to capture the attention of consumers, bringing back nostalgia while offering a new, trendy option.

data.title: Fieldwork and Patrick Bailey Release Collaboration Beer "Strike Thief 2x Gold Lager"
data.description: In Berkeley, California on April 2, 2026, Fieldwork and San Francisco's catcher, Patrick Bailey, have teamed up to introduce their new collaboration: Strike Thief 2x Gold Lager. This announcement comes as baseball season kicks off in the Bay Area.

data.title: Forsyth Advisors Introduces Tariff Center of Excellence
data.description: Announcing their new Tariff Center of Excellence (COE), Forsyth Advisors revealed their strategy to save clients significant amounts. The center, launched officially on April 2, 2026, aims to reduce tariff exposure for companies by combining the firm's knowledge, tools, and operational capabilities. This move is designed to provide enterprises with substantial six-figure savings through efficient management of tariffs.

data.title: Fexa Launches FexaAI: The First Multi-Agent AI Platform Built for Facilities Management
data.description: In Jersey City, New Jersey on April 2, 2026, Fexa introduced FexaAI, a multi-agent platform comprising AI agents designed to revolutionize the facilities management industry. This launch signifies a significant advancement for Fexa as the technology provides unparalleled flexibility and intelligence. The platform is set to transform the FM sector with its innovative approach.

data.title: Erin Mitchell Named Finalist for 2026 Distinguished Woman in Logistics Award
data.description: In Henderson, Nevada, on April 2, 2026, YMX Logistics revealed that their Chief Operating Officer, Erin, has been acknowledged by the Women In Trucking Association for her significant impact on the industry. YMX Logistics, a prominent player in integrated yard logistics for enterprise shippers, commended Erin for her role as a driving force within the company.

data.title: Nanox Signs Distribution Agreement with Integrity Medical Service, Inc. to Deploy Nanox.ARC Systems
data.description: Nanox has expanded its service support across outpatient imaging settings in Colorado, Wyoming, western parts of Kansas, and Nebraska through a new regional partnership. This move is expected to increase Nanox’s presence in the region, enhancing its accessibility to a larger customer base. The partnership aims to improve the overall reach of Nanox’s services in this area and signifies a strategic growth initiative for the company.(Characters: 266)
